description: Open Banking UK publishes technical standards and guidance for UK open banking, including Read/Write, Open Data, Dynamic Client Registration, and reporting specifications. The GitHub Pages site serves documentation and reference material rather than a first-party integration endpoint on this domain.
summary: openbankinguk.github.io hosts public documentation sites for Open Banking UK standards, but no developer-callable API, GraphQL endpoint, MCP server, or CLI on the openbankinguk.github.io domain itself.
